exploreUrl:
<js>
function setArgument(key, value) {
    var open_argument = source.getVariable();
    open_argument = getArguments(open_argument, '') || {};
    open_argument[key] = value;
    var result = JSON.stringify(open_argument);
    source.setVariable(result);
    return result;
}

function getFanqieCookie() {
    try {
        return String(cookie.getCookie('fanqienovel.com') || java.getCookie('fanqienovel.com') || '');
    } catch (e) {
        return '';
    }
}

var open_argument = source.getVariable();
var base_url = getArguments(open_argument, 'server') || '';
var ms = getArguments(open_argument, 'tone_id') || '';
var source_type = getArguments(open_argument, 'source_type') || '男频';
var tab = getArguments(open_argument, 'media') || '小说';
var sources = getArguments(open_argument, 'source') || '番茄';


var sdtoken;
try {
    var loginInfoMap = source.getLoginInfoMap ? source.getLoginInfoMap() : {};
    sdtoken = String(loginInfoMap['手动填写番茄token(可不填)'] || '');
} catch (e) {
    sdtoken = '';
}

var rawCookie = getFanqieCookie() || sdtoken;
var match = rawCookie.match(/sessionid=[^;]+/);
var fqcookie = match ? encodeURIComponent(match[0]) : '';
if (!fqcookie) {
    java.toast('您还未登陆番茄账号，无法同步数据哦！');
    }
var fqsjurl = base_url + "/bookshelf?page={{page}}&cookie=" + fqcookie;

var groupDatas = [];
var infoData = [];

function deviceType() {
    try {
        return !!java.androidId();
    } catch (e) {
        return false;
    }
}

var device = deviceType() ? 'android' : 'ios';
var hasValidCookie = fqcookie.length > 0;

if (device === 'android' && hasValidCookie) {
    function groupQuery() {
        try {
            var url = base_url + "/group_name?cookie=" + fqcookie;
            var res = java.ajax(url);
            var response = JSON.parse(res);
            
            if (!(response && response.data)) {
                  }

            response.data.forEach(function(group) {
                var keys = Object.keys(group);
                if (keys.length > 0) {
                    var key = keys[0];
                    var value = group[key];
                    if (value && value.length) {
                    	var option = {
                             "method": "POST" ,
                             "body": {"book_ids":value,
                                            "page":"{{page}}"}
                             };
                            groupDatas.push({
                            title: key,
                            url: base_url + "/bookshelf3," + JSON.stringify(option),
                            style: {
                                layout_flexGrow: 1,
                                layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                            }
                        });
                    }
                }
            });

            if (groupDatas.length % 2 !== 0) {
                groupDatas.push({
                    title: "--",
                    url: "",
                    style: {
                        layout_flexGrow: 1,
                        layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                    }
                });
            }
        } catch (e) {
            java.longToast("分组获取失败: " + e.message);
                    }
    }

    try {
        java.longToast("正在加载分组数据...");
        var sessionid = match ? match[0] : '';
        var userUrl = base_url + "/fquser?" + sessionid;
        var userRes = java.ajax(userUrl);
        var userData = JSON.parse(userRes);
        
        var userName = (userData && userData.data && userData.data.name) ? userData.data.name : '未知用户';
        infoData = [{
            title: userName + "个人中心",
            url: fqsjurl,
            style: {
                layout_flexGrow: 1,
                layout_flexBasisPercent: 1
            }
        }];
        
        groupQuery();
    } catch (e) {
        java.longToast("操作失败: " + e.message);
            }
}

var style_list = [];
try {
    var durl =  `${base_url}/discover_style?source=${sources}&source_type=${source_type}&tab=${tab}`;
    var res = java.ajax(durl);
    var result = JSON.parse(res);
    style_list = result.style_list || [];
    java.toast(result.msg);
} catch (e) {
    java.toast("发现样式获取失败");
}

var finalData = infoData.concat(groupDatas, style_list);
JSON.stringify(finalData);
</js>

ruleBookInfo.author: $.author
ruleBookInfo.intro:
<js>
const {
    book_id,
    source: sources,
    tab,
    book_tts,
    tags,
    role,
    last_chapter_title,
    last_chapter_update_time,
    word_number,
    status,
    score,
    media,
    abstract,
    book_review,
    copyright_info
} = result;
java.put('book_detail',JSON.stringify(result));
let info;
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(),'server');
let key = '';

try {
	key = String(cookie.getCookie(base_url)) || String(java.getCookie(base_url));
	key = getKey(key);
        } catch (e) {key='';}
if (key != ''){key = '✅️已登录';} else {key = '‼️⛔️您还未登录大灰狼账号哦，可以点击右上角登录♨️';}
info = `  🎚当前服务器：${base_url}
🪄大灰狼账号：${key}
🎴当前来源：${sources}
🗂当前模式：${tab}\n`
if (tab =='听书') {info = info+	'🔊当前音色：'+ getArguments(source.getVariable(),'tone_id')+'\n'+book_tts+'\n‎';}
if (`${tags}`) {info = info +  `🕹分类：${tags}\n`};
if (`${role}`) {info = info +  `🎗书籍主角：${role}\n`};
if (`${last_chapter_title}`) {info = info +  `🎯最新章节：${last_chapter_title}\n`};
if (`${last_chapter_update_time}`) {info = info +  `⏳更新时间：${last_chapter_update_time}\n`};
if (`${word_number}`) {info = info +  `📝书籍字数：${word_number}\n`};
if (`${status}`) {info = info +  `💥书籍状态：${status}\n`};
if (`${score}`) {info = info +  `✨书籍评分：${score}\n`};
if (`${media}`) {info = info +  `📌出版媒体：${media}\n`};
if (`${abstract}`) {info = info +  `‎
📚书籍简介：
${abstract}\n`};
if (`${book_review}`) {info = info +  `‎\n${book_review}\n`};
if (`${copyright_info}`) {info = info +  `📍${copyright_info}`};
</js>

<js>

let sources = res[3];

	key2 = String(cookie.getCookie(base_url)) || String(java.getCookie(base_url));
	key2 = getKey(key2);
        } catch (e) {key2='';} 
let device,device_type;
try {
    device = java.androidId();
    device_type='安卓';
} catch (e) {
    try{
device = java.deviceID();
device_type='苹果';
}catch (e) {device = '';
device_type='安卓';
}
}
let sq_user_id = getArguments(source.getVariable(),'sq_user_id') || '0';

let content_url;
if (tab=='小说') {
	content_url= `/content?item_id=${item_id}&device=${device}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&sq_user_id=${sq_user_id}&key=${key2}&version=3`;
 } 
 else if (tab=='听书') {
 	 	content_url= `/content?item_id=${item_id}&device=${device}&tone_id=${tone_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&key=${key2}&version=3`;
 	} else if (tab=='漫画') {
 		 	content_url=	`/content?item_id=${item_id}&device=${device}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&key=${key2}&version=3`;
 		} else if (tab=='短剧' || tab=='视频') {
 		content_url=	`/content?item_id=${item_id}&device=${device}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&key=${key2}&version=3`;
 			}
 let data = java.ajax(base_url+content_url);
 try {
if (JSON.parse(data).msg) {
	java.toast(JSON.parse(data).msg);
	}}catch (e) {}
data = JSON.parse(data);
let content = decrypt(data.content);
data = JSON.stringify({'content':content});
//java.log(decrypt(data.content));
if (device_type=='安卓' && (tab  == '短剧' || tab== '视频')){
	data = {'content':`【右上角刷新】开启播放(下一集请切换下一章刷新)\n播放直链：\n${content}`}
	data = JSON.stringify(data);
	 if (book.durChapterIndex===chapter.index){
	 //let b64 = java.base64Encode(generateVideoPage(title,content));
	// let dataUrl = `data:text/html;base64,${b64}`;
	// 	java.startBrowser(dataUrl,title);
	 	java.startBrowser(content,title);
	 	java.toast('正在加载视频...');
	}};

data;
</js>

<js>
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(),'server');
let key2 = '';
try {
	key2 = String(cookie.getCookie(base_url)) || String(java.getCookie(base_url));
	key2 = getKey(key2);
        } catch (e) {key2='';}


let media;
let sources = getArguments(source.getVariable(),'source');
if (String(key).startsWith("m:")||String(key).startsWith("m：")) {
  media = "漫画"
  key = key.slice(2)
  }else if (String(key).startsWith("t:")||String(key).startsWith("t：")) {
  media = "听书"
  key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("d:")||String(key).startsWith("d：")) {
  media = "短剧"
  key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("x:")||String(key).startsWith("x："))  {
	media = "小说"
  key = key.slice(2)
	} else {
	media = getArguments(source.getVariable(),'media');
	}
if (key.includes('@')) {
  const parts = key.split('@');
  key = parts[0];
  sources = parts[1] || sources;
}
	`${base_url}/search?title=${key}&tab=${media}&source=${sources}&key=${key2}`
</js>

var callback_base64= base64(callback)

  headers: {
"Referer": "https://www.quanben.io/n/wodenushen/list.html"
  }
});
var url="https://www.quanben.io/index.php?c=book&a=list.jsonp&callback="+callback+"&book_id="+book_id+"&b="+callback_base64+","+head
var url_src=java.ajax(url)

var r2=url_src_json_data.content

ruleContent.content:
<js>
try{
form=java.getElement("#article form")
txt=java.getElement("#article [class=001] p")
while (form!=""){
	code=String(java.getString("strong@textNodes",form)).trim()
	java.log(code)
	result=java.ajax(`${baseUrl},{"body":"captcha=${code}","method":"POST"}`)
	java.setContent(result)
	form=java.getElement("#article form")
	}
b64=result.match(/atob\('([^']+)'\)/)[1]
if(result.match(/'aes'\s*===\s*'aes'/)){
	key=result.match(/CryptoJS\.enc\.Base64\.parse\('([^']+)'\)/)[1]
	
	txt+=java.createSymmetricCrypto("AES/ECB/Pkcs7Padding", java.base64DecodeToByteArray(key)).decryptStr(b64)
	}else{
		txt+=java.base64Decode(b64)
		
		}
result=txt}catch{result="\n这章正文不存在！！！\n换一章！！！\n或者\n换本书！！！\n或者\n换源！！！"}
</js>

bookSourceComment:
幻梦轻小说全网最齐全的轻小说网，访问速度优质而且网页内置插图，拥有海量的轻小说书籍，如果有网页bug或者需求的小说可以进网站群及时反馈


作者留言：

1.0更新：本网站所有的小说都是免费的，目前已经有了PC端和wap端，APP端目前还有点问题需要调试

本次初次制作好了对接阅读的书源，但是为了避免被大规模盗刷流量，书源暂时没有对接插图

2.0更新：本次更新解决了插图问题，让书源可以显示插图，显示不出来多刷新就行

站长在Cdn处新增速率限制，超过限制会被拉黑，国外地区也会无法访问插图，非官网访问也会无法访问插图

如果后续阅读方面流量过于异常，我会关闭阅读的阅读插图渠道，希望各位可以理解

2.1更新：新增发现页面的选项功能，用户可以更快速便捷的从分类和题材中寻找自己想要的小说

2.2更新：修复发现页面的分类功能异常的问题，现在移除文库分类

注意：分类中可能出现总是有几本相同的小说在上面，其实这很正常，这是网站的推荐小说，会优先出现在分类之前

更多详情内容，可以关注：www.huanmengacg.com

QQ讨论群：907189428
bookSourceName: 🍇幻梦轻小说2.2（插图优化+分类异常修复）

ruleContent.content:
<js>
if (baseUrl.startsWith('data')) {
    let decodedData = String(java.hexDecodeToString(src));
    let [ruleStr, initialUrl] = decodedData.split('|');
    let finalUrl = initialUrl;
    let initialCount = 0;
    const finalCount = 10;
    while (initialCount < finalCount) {
            initialCount++;
            let Content = java.ajax(source.key + finalUrl);
            let thUrl = java.getString(ruleStr, Content);
            finalUrl = thUrl;
         if (!thUrl.includes('_')) break;
    }
    result = java.ajax(source.key + finalUrl);
    java.setContent(result);
}
result;
</js>
#content > :not(a)@html

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
let pages = Array.from(java.getStringList('option@value', null, true));

var chapters = java.ajaxAll(pages).flatMap(m => {
    let chapterLists = org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(m.body()).select('.section-list');
    return Array.from(chapterLists.get(1).select('a'));
});

var list = chapters.map((item, i) => {
    let url = String(item.attr('href'));
    if (!url) {
        let thUrl = i < chapters.length - 1 ? chapters[i+1].attr('href') : chapters[i-1].attr('href');
        let ruleStr = i < chapters.length - 1 ? "#prev_url@href" : "#next_url@href";
       if (String(thUrl)) url = "data:;base64," + java.base64Encode(ruleStr + "|" + thUrl) + ',{"type": "chapter"}';
    }
    //java.log(url)
    return { 
        name: item.text(), 
        Url: url
    };
});
list;
</js>

.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?\d+/,'$1')
.replace(/^(\d+)、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?第.+章/,'$1')
.replace(/第\s(.+)\s章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/.*(chapter|Chapter)\s?(\d+)\s?/,'$1 $2 ')
.replace(/\(.+\)/,'')
.replace(/\[|。/,'')
.replace(/第([零一二两三四五六七八九十百千]+)章/g,java.toNumChapter(result))
##(章)([^\s]+)(\s·)##$1 $2$3

header:
<js>
(() => {
	try {
		data = JSON.parse(source.getVariable())
	} catch (err) {
		data = {}
	}
	sessionID = data.sessionID||"";
	if (!sessionID) {
		chars = "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz123456789";
		charsLength = chars.length
		for (i = 0; i < 26; i++) {
			sessionID += chars.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * charsLength))
		}
		data.sessionID = sessionID
		source.setVariable(JSON.stringify(data))
	}
	return JSON.stringify({
		"cookie": "PHPSESSID=" + sessionID,
		"User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 13_3_1 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/13.0.5 Mobile/15E148 Snapchat/10.77.5.59 (like Safari/604.1)"
	})
})()
</js>

bookSourceComment:
1.需要在书源登录真白萌，才能正常使用此书源，登陆时请耐心等待验证；
2.章节前面有🔒的标志，且内容为"立即打钱"，请唤起小说界面UI，点击右上角的书源名，有购买选项；
3.请确保自己账号金币充足，另外购买后不会去掉🔒，但正文会自动刷新；
4.真白萌有访问次数限制，短时间访问太多次会被ban，所以建议把APP的正文预下载调低；
5.如果刷新正文一直是获取失败，那请隔一段时间再刷新，也有可能是需要重新登录书源；
6.现在登录按钮有两个功能了，一个登录，一个更新书源；
7.仅限本次更新书源后，可能会显示你的书找不到源，删除后再重新搜索添加吧；
8.删除后不要退出APP，这样可以保证你重新添加的书籍之前缓存的章节还在；
9.待补充；

<js>
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(),'server',String(source.bookSourceComment));
let key2 = '';
try {
	key2 = String(cookie.getCookie(base_url)) || String(java.getCookie(base_url));
	key2 = getKey(key2);
        } catch (e) {key2='';}


let media;
let sources = getArguments(source.getVariable(),'source',String(source.bookSourceComment));
if (String(key).startsWith("m:")||String(key).startsWith("m：")) {
  media = "漫画"
  key = key.slice(2)
  }else if (String(key).startsWith("t:")||String(key).startsWith("t：")) {
  media = "听书"
  key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("d:")||String(key).startsWith("d：")) {
  media = "短剧"
  key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("x:")||String(key).startsWith("x："))  {
	media = "小说"
  key = key.slice(2)
	} else {
	media = getArguments(source.getVariable(),'media',String(source.bookSourceComment));
	}
if (key.includes('@')) {
  const parts = key.split('@');
  key = parts[0];
  sources = parts[1] || sources;
}
	`${base_url}/search?title=${key}&tab=${media}&source=${sources}&key=${key2}`
</js>

ruleContent.content:
<js>

let res =java.hexDecodeToString(result).split('书山融合2.1');

let item_id = res[0];
let tab = res[1];
let title = res[2];
let sources = res[3];
let tone_id = getArguments(source.getVariable(),'tone_id',String(source.bookSourceComment));
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(),'server',String(source.bookSourceComment));
let key2 = '';
try {
	key2 = String(cookie.getCookie(base_url)) || String(java.getCookie(base_url));
	key2 = getKey(key2);
        } catch (e) {key2='';} 
let device,device_type;
try {
    device = java.androidId();
    device_type='安卓';
} catch (e) {
    try{
device = java.deviceID();
device_type='苹果';
}catch (e) {device = '';
device_type='安卓';
}
}
let sq_user_id = getArguments(source.getVariable(),'sq_user_id',String(source.bookSourceComment)) || '0';

let content_url;
if (tab=='小说') {
	content_url= `/content?item_id=${item_id}&device=${device}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&sq_user_id=${sq_user_id}&key=${key2}&version=3`;
 } 
 else if (tab=='听书') {
 	 	content_url= `/content?item_id=${item_id}&device=${device}&tone_id=${tone_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&key=${key2}&version=3`;
 	} else if (tab=='漫画') {
 		 	content_url=	`/content?item_id=${item_id}&device=${device}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&key=${key2}&version=3`;
 		} else if (tab=='短剧') {
 		content_url=	`/content?item_id=${item_id}&device=${device}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&key=${key2}&version=3`;
 			}
 let data = java.ajax(base_url+content_url);
 try {
if (JSON.parse(data).msg) {
	java.toast(JSON.parse(data).msg);
	}}catch (e) {}
data = JSON.parse(data);
let content = decrypt(data.content);
data = JSON.stringify({'content':content});
//java.log(decrypt(data.content));
if (device_type=='安卓' && tab  == '短剧'){
	data = {'content':`【右上角刷新】开启播放(下一集请切换下一章刷新)\n播放直链：\n${content}`}
	data = JSON.stringify(data);
	 if (book.durChapterIndex===chapter.index){
	 //let b64 = java.base64Encode(generateVideoPage(title,content));
	// let dataUrl = `data:text/html;base64,${b64}`;
	// 	java.startBrowser(dataUrl,title);
	 	java.startBrowser(content,title);
	 	java.toast('正在加载视频...');
	}};

data;
</js>

exploreUrl:
<js>
function setArgument(key, value) {
    var open_argument = source.getVariable();
    open_argument = getArguments(open_argument, '', String(source.bookSourceComment)) || {};
    open_argument[key] = value;
    var result = JSON.stringify(open_argument);
    source.setVariable(result);
    return result;
}

function getFanqieCookie() {
    try {
        return String(cookie.getCookie('fanqienovel.com') || java.getCookie('fanqienovel.com') || '');
    } catch (e) {
        return '';
    }
}

var open_argument = source.getVariable();
var base_url = getArguments(open_argument, 'server', String(source.bookSourceComment)) || '';
var ms = getArguments(open_argument, 'tone_id', String(source.bookSourceComment)) || '';
var source_type = getArguments(open_argument, 'source_type', String(source.bookSourceComment)) || '男频';
var tab = getArguments(open_argument, 'media', String(source.bookSourceComment)) || '小说';
var sources = getArguments(open_argument, 'source', String(source.bookSourceComment)) || '番茄';


var sdtoken;
try {
    var loginInfoMap = source.getLoginInfoMap ? source.getLoginInfoMap() : {};
    sdtoken = String(loginInfoMap['手动填写番茄token(可不填)'] || '');
} catch (e) {
    sdtoken = '';
}

var rawCookie = getFanqieCookie() || sdtoken;
var match = rawCookie.match(/sessionid=[^;]+/);
var fqcookie = match ? encodeURIComponent(match[0]) : '';
if (!fqcookie) {
    java.toast('您还未登陆番茄账号，无法同步数据哦！');
    }
var fqsjurl = base_url + "/bookshelf?page={{page}}&cookie=" + fqcookie;

var groupDatas = [];
var infoData = [];

function deviceType() {
    try {
        return !!java.androidId();
    } catch (e) {
        return false;
    }
}

var device = deviceType() ? 'android' : 'ios';
var hasValidCookie = fqcookie.length > 0;

if (device === 'android' && hasValidCookie) {
    function groupQuery() {
        try {
            var url = base_url + "/group_name?cookie=" + fqcookie;
            var res = java.ajax(url);
            var response = JSON.parse(res);
            
            if (!(response && response.data)) {
                  }

            response.data.forEach(function(group) {
                var keys = Object.keys(group);
                if (keys.length > 0) {
                    var key = keys[0];
                    var value = group[key];
                    if (value && value.length) {
                        groupDatas.push({
                            title: key,
                            url: base_url + "/bookshelf2?page={{page}}&book_ids=" + value.join(","),
                            style: {
                                layout_flexGrow: 1,
                                layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                            }
                        });
                    }
                }
            });

            if (groupDatas.length % 2 !== 0) {
                groupDatas.push({
                    title: "--",
                    url: "",
                    style: {
                        layout_flexGrow: 1,
                        layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                    }
                });
            }
        } catch (e) {
            java.longToast("分组获取失败: " + e.message);
                    }
    }

    try {
        java.longToast("正在加载分组数据...");
        var sessionid = match ? match[0] : '';
        var userUrl = base_url + "/fquser?" + sessionid;
        var userRes = java.ajax(userUrl);
        var userData = JSON.parse(userRes);
        
        var userName = (userData && userData.data && userData.data.name) ? userData.data.name : '未知用户';
        infoData = [{
            title: userName + "个人中心",
            url: "",
            style: {
                layout_flexGrow: 1,
                layout_flexBasisPercent: 1
            }
        }];
        
        groupQuery();
    } catch (e) {
        java.longToast("操作失败: " + e.message);
            }
}

var style_list = [];
try {
    var durl =  `${base_url}/discover_style?source=${sources}&source_type=${source_type}&tab=${tab}`;
    var res = java.ajax(durl);
    var result = JSON.parse(res);
    style_list = result.style_list || [];
    java.toast(result.msg);
} catch (e) {
    java.toast("发现样式获取失败");
}

var finalData = infoData.concat(groupDatas, style_list);
JSON.stringify(finalData);
</js>

	let headers={'app-version':'51110','platform':'android','reg':'0','AUTHORIZATION':'','application-id':'com.****.reader','net-env':'1','channel':'unknown','qm-params':''}
	sign_key='d3dGiJc651gSQ8w1'

params={'id':{{$.book_id}}, 'imei_ip':'2937357107','teeny_mode':0}

var urlEncode = function (param, key, encode) {  
  if(param==null) return '';  
  var paramStr = '';  
  var t = typeof (param);  
  if (t == 'string' || t == 'number' || t == 'boolean') {  
    paramStr += '&' + key + '=' + ((encode==null||encode) ? encodeURIComponent(param) : param);  
  } else {  
    for (var i in param) {  
      var k = key == null ? i : key + (param instanceof Array ? '[' + i + ']' : '.' + i);  
      paramStr += urlEncode(param[i], k, encode);  
    }  
  }  
  return paramStr;  
};
paramSign=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(params).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+params[n],'')+sign_key));
headerSign=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(headers).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+headers[n],'')+sign_key))
params['sign']=paramSign;
headers['sign']=headerSign;
let url = "https://api-bc.wtzw.com/api/v4/book/detail?"+urlEncode(params);
option = {'headers':headers};
let last =JSON.parse(java.ajax(url+','+JSON.stringify(option)))["data"]["book"];

(() => {
	try {
		data = JSON.parse(source.getVariable())
	} catch (err) {
		data = {}
	}
	sessionID = data.sessionID||"";
	if (!sessionID) {
		chars = "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz123456789";
		charsLength = chars.length
		for (i = 0; i < 26; i++) {
			sessionID += chars.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * charsLength))
		}
		data.sessionID = sessionID
		source.setVariable(JSON.stringify(data))
	}
	return JSON.stringify({

	})
})()
</js>

<js>
sort=[];
	push=(title,url,type,fp)=>sort.push({
		title: title,
		url: url,
		style: {
				layout_flexGrow: fp,
				layout_flexBasisPercent: type
			}
	});
	u="https://apiv2hans.aixdzs.com/sort"
	xx=(a,b)=>{
		return `list,{"method": "POST","body":'{"bookTypeId":"${a}","type": "${b}","pageNum": "{{page}}"}'}`;
	}
	fls = JSON.parse(java.post(u,'',{}).body());
	push("最新",'',1,1)
	for(f of fls.data.allType){
		push(f.categoryName,u+xx(f.bookTypeId,1),0.25,0.25);
	}
	push("——",'',0.25,0.25)
	push("——",'',0.25,0.25)
	push("大热",'',1,1)
	for(l of fls.data.allType){
		push(l.categoryName,u+xx(l.bookTypeId,2),0.25,0.25);
	}
	push("——",'',0.25,0.25)
	push("——",'',0.25,0.25)
	//完本:3
	JSON.stringify(sort);
</js>

@js:result
.replace("••","")
.replace(/^(\d+).第/,'第')
.replace(/^(正文|VIP章节|最新章节)?(\s+|_)|[\(\{（｛【].*[求更谢乐发推票盟补加字Kk\/].*[\)\}）｝】]/g,'')
.replace(/^(\d+)[、．]第.+章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(\d+)、\d+/,'第$1章')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?\d+/,'$1')
.replace(/^(\d+)、/,'第$1章 ')
.replace(/^(第.+章)\s?第.+章/,'$1')
.replace(/第\s(.+)\s章/,'第$1章')
.replace(/.*(chapter|Chapter)\s?(\d+)\s?/,'$1 $2 ')
.replace(/\(.+\)/,'')
.replace(/\[|。/,'')
.replace(/第([零一二三四五六七八九十百千]+)章/g,java.toNumChapter(result))

  "headers":{"checkSumDTO":'{"appid":"ixdzs","checksum":"${sha1}","curtime":"${a}","nonce":"${h}"}'}
}`

result = java.ajax(url+post);

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
  let defaultVariable = {
    "volume": {
      "status": false,
      "mode": 1,
      "spacer": " | ",
      "emptyVolumeName": {
        "action": false,
        "replace": "第一卷：默认"
      },
      "onlyOneShow": false
    }
  }
  let variable = (book.getVariable("custom") != "" && book.getVariable("custom") != null) ? book.getVariable("custom") : source.getVariable();
  if(variable != "" && variable != null){
    try{
      variable = JSON.parse(variable);
    } catch(err) {
      java.log(err);
      variable = defaultVariable;
    }
  } else {
    variable = defaultVariable;
  }
  let data = JSON.parse(result).data;
  let list = data.chapterListWithVolume;
  let volume = data.volumeNameList;
  let chapters = [];
  let volume_names = [];
  for(let i in list){
    for(let x in list[i]){
      let c = list[i][x];
      if(variable.volume.status == true && variable.volume.mode == 1 && volume_names.indexOf(c.volume_name) == -1){
        volume_names.push(c.volume_name);
        if(volume.length != 1 || variable.volume.onlyOneShow){
          chapters.push({
            title: ((c.volume_name == "" && variable.volume.emptyVolumeName.action == "replace" && variable.volume.emptyVolumeName.replace) ? variable.volume.emptyVolumeName.replace : c.volume_name),
            isVolume: true
          });
        }
      }
      if(variable.volume.status == true && variable.volume.mode == 2){
        if(c.volume_name == "" && variable.volume.emptyVolumeName.action == "replace" && variable.volume.emptyVolumeName.replace){
          c.title = (c.volume_name == "" ? variable.volume.emptyVolumeName.replace : c.volume_name) + (variable.volume.spacer || " | ") + c.title;
        } else if(volume.length != 1 || variable.volume.onlyOneShow){
          c.title = c.volume_name + (variable.volume.spacer || " | ") + c.title;
        }
      }
      c.url  = source.bookSourceUrl +  `/content?item_id=${c.itemId}`;
      chapters.push(c);
    }
  }
  chapters
</js>
ruleToc.chapterName: title<js>##正文卷.|正文.|VIP章节.|免费章节.|VIP卷.|默认卷.|章节目录.|最新章节.|[\(（【].*?[求更谢乐发订/万架字票合补加].*?[】）\)]</js>

exploreUrl:
<js>
function setArgument(key, value) {
    var open_argument = source.getVariable();
    open_argument = getArguments(open_argument, '') || {};
    open_argument[key] = value;
    var result = JSON.stringify(open_argument);
    source.setVariable(result);
    return result;
}

var open_argument = source.getVariable();
var base_url = getArguments(open_argument, 'server') || '';
var ms = getArguments(open_argument, 'tone_id') || '';
var source_type = getArguments(open_argument, 'source_type') || '男频';
var tab = getArguments(open_argument, 'media') || '小说';
var sources = getArguments(open_argument, 'source') || '番茄';


var sdtoken;
try {
    var loginInfoMap = source.getLoginInfoMap ? source.getLoginInfoMap() : {};
    sdtoken = String(loginInfoMap['手动填写番茄token(可不填)'] || '');
} catch (e) {
    sdtoken = '';
}

var rawCookie = getFanqieCookie() || sdtoken;
var match = rawCookie.match(/sessionid=[^;]+/);
var fqcookie = match ? match[0] : '';
var fqssionid = '';
if (!fqcookie) {
    java.toast('您还未登陆番茄账号，无法同步数据哦！');
} else {
    fqssionid = getSessionId(fqcookie)
}
var fqsjurl = base_url + "/bookshelf?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;

var groupDatas = [];
var infoData = [];

function deviceType() {
    try {
        return !!java.androidId();
    } catch (e) {
        return false;
    }
}

var hasValidCookie = fqcookie.length > 0;

if (hasValidCookie) {
    function groupQuery() {
        try {
            var url = base_url + "/group_name?ssionid=" + fqssionid;
            var res = java.ajax(url);
            var response = JSON.parse(res);

            if (!(response && response.data)) {}

            response.data.forEach(function(group) {
                var keys = Object.keys(group);
                if (keys.length > 0) {
                    var key = keys[0];
                    var value = group[key];
                    if (value && value.length) {
                        var option = {
                            "method": "POST",
                            "body": {
                                "book_ids": value,
                                "page": "{{page}}"
                            }
                        };
                        groupDatas.push({
                            title: key,
                            url: base_url + "/bookshelf," + JSON.stringify(option),
                            style: {
                                layout_flexGrow: 1,
                                layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                            }
                        });
                    }
                }
            });

            if (groupDatas.length % 2 !== 0) {
                groupDatas.push({
                    title: "--",
                    url: "",
                    style: {
                        layout_flexGrow: 1,
                        layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                    }
                });
            }
        } catch (e) {
            java.longToast("分组获取失败: " + e.message);
        }
    }

    try {
        java.longToast("正在加载分组数据...");
        var userUrl = base_url + "/fquser?ssionid=" + fqssionid;
        var userRes = java.ajax(userUrl);
        var userData = JSON.parse(userRes);

        var userName = (userData && userData.data && userData.data.name) ? userData.data.name : '未知用户';
        infoData = [{
            title: userName + "个人中心",
            url: fqsjurl,
            style: {
                layout_flexGrow: 1,
                layout_flexBasisPercent: 1
            }
        }];

        groupQuery();
    } catch (e) {
        java.longToast("操作失败: " + e.message);
    }
}

var style_list = [];
try {
    var durl = `${base_url}/discovestyle?source=${sources}&source_type=${source_type}&tab=${tab}`;
    var res = java.ajax(durl);
    var result = JSON.parse(res);
    style_list = result.data || [];
    if (result.msg) {
        java.toast(result.msg);
    }
} catch (e) {
    java.toast("发现样式获取失败");
}

var finalData = infoData.concat(groupDatas, style_list);
JSON.stringify(finalData);
</js>

ruleBookInfo.intro:
<js>
let {
  book_id,
  source: sources,
  tab,
  book_tts,
  tags,
  role,
  last_chapter_title,
  last_chapter_update_time,
  word_number,
  status,
  score,
  abstract,
  copyright_info
} = result;
let proxy = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "proxy");
if (proxy == "本地") {
  proxy = "本地网络";
} else {
  proxy = "服务器网络";
}
java.put("book_detail", JSON.stringify(result));

let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server");
let key = "";
try {
  let cookieValue =
    String(cookie.getCookie(base_url)) || String(java.getCookie(base_url));
  key = getKey(cookieValue);
} catch (e) {
  key = "";
}

if (key == "") {
  java.log("当前服务器未查询到登录状态，尝试查询其他服务器登录状态...");
  let cookieValue;
  for (let h of host) {
    try {
      cookieValue = String(cookie.getCookie(h)) || String(java.getCookie(h));
      key = getKey(cookieValue);
    } catch (e) {
      key = "";
    }
    if (key) {
      java.log(`已在${h}登录，退出查询，正在转移登录状态到当前服务${base_url}`);
      //java.log(cookieValue)
      removeCookie(h);
      removeCookie(base_url);
      cookie.setCookie(base_url, cookieValue);
      break;
    }
  }
}

if (book.readConfig == null || book.readConfig.useReplaceRule == null) {
  book.setUseReplaceRule(false);
}
let loginStatus = key ? "✅ 已登录" : "⚠️ 未登录 | 点击右上角 🔖 登录";

let lightDivider = "❇️───────❇️───────❇️";
let heavyDivider = "‎\n‎";

let isValid = (value) => String(value).length > 1;

let info = `
    📡 当前服务：${base_url}
    🔑 账号状态：${loginStatus}
    🏷 数据来源：${sources}
    🔄 当前模式：${tab}
    ⚙️ 访问模式：${proxy}
`;

if (tab == "听书") {
  let toneId = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "tone_id");
  if (isValid(book_tts)) {
    info += `${lightDivider}
    🎵 音色配置：${toneId}
    ${book_tts}
`;
  }
}

let basicInfo = "";
let addBasicInfo = (value, prefix, icon) => {
  if (isValid(value)) basicInfo += `    ${icon} ${prefix} ${value}\n`;
};

addBasicInfo(tags, "书籍分类：", "🌈");
addBasicInfo(role, "书籍主角：", "👑");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳");
addBasicInfo(word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊");
addBasicInfo(status, "书籍状态：", "🚩");
addBasicInfo(score, "书籍评分：", "⭐");

if (basicInfo) info += `${lightDivider}\n${basicInfo}`;

if (isValid(abstract)) {
  let indentedAbstract = abstract
    .split("\n")
    .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
    .join("\n");
  info += `${heavyDivider}
    📖 书籍简介：
${indentedAbstract}
`;
} else {
  info += `${heavyDivider}`;
}

if (isValid(copyright_info)) {
  info += `${lightDivider}
    © ${copyright_info}
`;
} else {
  info += `${lightDivider}`;
}

info += `
${heavyDivider}
    💠💠💠 数据更新于 ${new Date().toLocaleString()} 💠💠💠
`;
let jjinfo = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "info");

if (jjinfo != "on") {
  info = String(info)
    .split("\n")
    .map((line) => line.replace(/^ {4}/, ""))
    .join("\n");
} else {
  basicInfo = "";
  addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚");
  addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳");
  addBasicInfo(word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊");
  addBasicInfo(status, "书籍状态：", "🚩");
  addBasicInfo(score, "书籍评分：", "⭐");
  if (isValid(abstract)) {
    let indentedAbstract = abstract
      .split("\n")
      .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
      .join("\n");
    basicInfo += `
    \n‎
    📖 书籍简介：
${indentedAbstract}
`;
  } else {
    basicInfo += `${heavyDivider}`;
  }
  info = `‎\n🏷 数据来源：${sources}\n` + basicInfo;
}

}

<js>
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(),'server');
let media;
let sources = getArguments(source.getVariable(),'source');
if (String(key).startsWith("m:")||String(key).startsWith("m：")) {
  media = "漫画"
  key = key.slice(2)
  }else if (String(key).startsWith("t:")||String(key).startsWith("t：")) {
  media = "听书"
  key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("d:")||String(key).startsWith("d：")) {
  media = "短剧"
  key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("x:")||String(key).startsWith("x："))  {
	media = "小说"
  key = key.slice(2)
	} else {
	media = getArguments(source.getVariable(),'media');
	}
if (key.includes('@')) {
  var parts = key.split('@');
  key = parts[0];
  sources = parts[1] || sources;
}
	`${base_url}/search?title=${key}&tab=${media}&source=${sources}&page={{page}}`
</js>

var bes = result.match(/PHA\+[A-Za-z0-9+\/]+={0,2}/g);

    java.webView(null, baseUrl, null);
    txt = java.getString("#booktxt@html");
    java.longToast("解密失败");
} else {
    txt = bes.map(b => String(java.base64Decode(b))).join('\n');
}
txt;
</js>

ruleExplore.bookList:
<js>
gender=baseUrl.match(/gender=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/gender=(\d+)/)[1]:""
category_id=baseUrl.match(/category_id=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/category_id=(\d+)/)[1]:""
need_filters=baseUrl.match(/need_filters=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/need_filters=(\d+)/)[1]:""
page=baseUrl.match(/page=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/page=(\d+)/)[1]:""
need_category=baseUrl.match(/need_category=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/need_category=(\d+)/)[1]:""
tag_id=baseUrl.match(/tag_id=(\d+)/)?baseUrl.match(/tag_id=(\d+)/)[1]:""
sign_key='d3dGiJc651gSQ8w1'
headers={'app-version':'51110','platform':'android','reg':'0','AUTHORIZATION':'','application-id':'com.****.reader','net-env':'1','channel':'unknown','qm-params':''}
headers['sign']=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(headers).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+headers[n],'')+sign_key))


var urlEncode = function (param, key, encode) {
  if(param==null) return '';
  var paramStr = '';
  var t = typeof (param);
  if (t == 'string' || t == 'number' || t == 'boolean') {
    paramStr += '&' + key + '=' + ((encode==null||encode) ? encodeURIComponent(param) : param);
  } else {
    for (var i in param) {
      var k = key == null ? i : key + (param instanceof Array ? '[' + i + ']' : '.' + i);
      paramStr += urlEncode(param[i], k, encode);
    }
  }
  return paramStr;
};

var category = function () {
  params={'gender':gender,'category_id':category_id,'need_filters':need_filters,'page':page,'need_category':need_category}
  params['sign']=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(params).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+params[n],'')+sign_key))
  url="https://api-bc.wtzw.com/api/v4/category/get-list?"+urlEncode(params)
  return java.ajax(url+','+java.put("headers",JSON.stringify({"headers":headers})))
};

var tag = function () {
  params={'gender':gender,'need_filters':need_filters,'page':page,'tag_id':tag_id}
  params['sign']=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(params).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+params[n],'')+sign_key))
  url="https://api-bc.wtzw.com/api/v4/tag/index?"+urlEncode(params)
  return java.ajax(url+','+java.put("headers",JSON.stringify({"headers":headers})))
};


if(baseUrl.match(/category/)){
  category()
}else {
  tag()
}
</js>

        vol: /img/.test(list[i].select("span")[0]) ? true : false,

}
data;

bookSourceComment:
幻梦轻小说全网最齐全的轻小说网，访问速度优质而且网页内置插图，拥有海量的轻小说书籍，如果有网页bug或者需求的小说可以进网站群及时反馈


作者留言：

1.0更新：本网站所有的小说都是免费的，目前已经有了PC端和wap端，APP端目前还有点问题需要调试

本次初次制作好了对接阅读的书源，但是为了避免被大规模盗刷流量，书源暂时没有对接插图

2.0更新：本次更新解决了插图问题，让书源可以显示插图，显示不出来多刷新就行

站长在Cdn处新增速率限制，超过限制会被拉黑，国外地区也会无法访问插图，非官网访问也会无法访问插图

如果后续阅读方面流量过于异常，我会关闭阅读的阅读插图渠道，希望各位可以理解

2.1更新：新增发现页面的选项功能，用户可以更快速便捷的从分类和题材中寻找自己想要的小说

2.2更新：修复发现页面的分类功能异常的问题，现在移除文库分类

2.3更新：修复发现界面过于拥挤，点击作者无法快速搜索作者，总有几本推荐阅读始终占据分类书籍顶部的问题，这里感谢QQ用户雪隐梅香提供的修复


2.4更新：优化了插图排版的问题，如果插图不是一张图片一页，可以尝试在阅读界面右上角手动把图片样式改为SINGLE

2.5更新：本次网站将图床更换为了下行宽带200M的服务器，方便大家更快的使用。与此同时修复了更换图床后，插图异常不显示的问题

2.6更新：网友修改优化版本，由于海外线路需要人机交互，修复了海外线路被阻拦，无法使用书源的问题

更多详情内容，可以关注：www.huanmengacg.com

QQ讨论群：907189428

ruleSearch.bookList:
<js>
JSON.stringify(org.jsoup.Jsoup.parse(src).select('a[class="details-part"]').toArray().map(item => {
	   let infoS = item.select('.book-module');
    let info = /search/.test(baseUrl) ? String(infoS.text()).split(/·+/) : infoS.select('span span').toArray().map(e => String(e.text()).replace(/\s/g, ","));
    return {
        name: item.select('dt').text(),
        author: info[0],
        cover: item.select('img').attr('data-original'),
        sort: (info.shift(),info.join(',')),
        intro: item.select('[class$="profile"]').text(),
        url: item.attr('href')
    }
}));
</js>
$[*]
ruleSearch.name: $.name

1.由于网站有验证机制，请将更多设置里的预下载设置为0，不要一次性缓存过多章节
2.需要登录，否则加载不了目录
3.网站如果被墙了，可以自行更换其它可用域名

常见问题解决办法：
1.刷新界面，登录验证
2.换网络换流量换vpn节点
3.清除缓存清除cookie清除web数据

bookSourceComment:
需登录
◎搜索格式◎
1、搜索用户<关闭精确搜索>
@用户名
2、搜索合集<关闭精确搜索>
#合集
3、搜索粮单
%粮单名<关闭精确搜索>
4、搜索文章，直接搜索

发现规则格式
                                    🏷标签

bookSourceComment:
请登录后使用
在设置书籍变量处填

以下格式：
开始页-结束页
如
10-20
则评论从第10页开始，第20页结束

默认最多从第1页至第10页结束
（更改完书籍变量一定要刷新正文）

<js>
function getPage(){	allpage=String(java.getString("@@class.num@text||class.redtext@text||class.pager.-2@text||class.pager.0@text")).match(/(\d+)/)?.[1]??0;
if(allpage===0){java.toast("请登录或购买后刷新");}
list=[]
len=allpage>10?10:allpage;
start=1;end=len;
if(book.getVariable("custom")!=""){
start=Number(book.getVariable("custom").match(/(\d+)-\d+/)[1]);
end=Number(book.getVariable("custom").match(/\d+-(\d+)/)[1]);
if(end>allpage)end=allpage;
}
java.toast("共加载"+(end-start+1)+"页，加载较慢...请稍候")
for(i=start;i<=end;i++){
list.push(baseUrl.replace(/page=\d*/,'')+"&page="+i);
}
java.log(JSON.stringify(list));
return list
	}

if(java.getString('//*[@align="center"]/text()')=="5000"){
	url = baseUrl+"&page=1";
	html = java.ajax(url);
	java.setContent(html);	
	result = getPage();
	}else if(baseUrl.match(/page=/)){
result=""
}else{
	result = getPage() 
	
	}
</js>

exploreUrl:
<js>
var discover = [];
var showR18 = false;
var push = (title, url, style) => {
    discover.push({
        title: title,
        url: url,
        style: {
            layout_flexGrow: 1,
            layout_flexBasisPercent: style
        }
    });
};
var addSlots = (count, style) => {
    var remainder = count % 3;
    var slotsAdd = remainder === 0 ? 0 : 3 - remainder;
    for (var i = 0; i < slotsAdd; i++) {
        push("", null, style);
    }
};
push("书架", null, 1);
try {
    var favored = java.ajax(`${baseUrl}/api/user/favored`);
    if (favored.includes("Token不合法或者过期")) {
    	   showR18 = false;
        push("账号未登录", null, 0.25);
        addSlots(1, 0.25);
    } else {
    	   showR18 = true;
    	   push("阅读历史", "/api/user/read-history?page={{(page-1)}}&pageSize=30", 0.25);
        var favoredData = JSON.parse(favored).favoredWeb;
        favoredData.forEach(item => {
            push(item.title, `/api/user/favored-web/${item.id}?page={{(page-1)}}&pageSize=30&query=&provider=kakuyomu%2Csyosetu%2Cnovelup%2Chameln%2Cpixiv%2Calphapolis&type=0&level=0&translate=0&sort=update`, 0.25);
        });
        addSlots(1 + favoredData.length, 0.25);
    }
} catch (e) {
	   showR18 = false;
    push("未知错误", null, 0.25);
    addSlots(1, 0.25);
}
push("来源", null, 1);
var providers = ["全部", "kakuyomu", "syosetu", "novelup", "hameln", "pixiv", "alphapolis"];
providers.forEach(provider => {
    var url = provider === "全部" ? 
        `/api/novel?page={{(page-1)}}&pageSize=20&query=&provider=${providers.slice(1).join('%2C')}&type=0&level=0&translate=0&sort=0` : 
        `/api/novel?page={{(page-1)}}&pageSize=20&query=&provider=${provider}&type=0&level=0&translate=0&sort=0`;
    push(provider, url, 0.25);
});
addSlots(providers.length, 0.25);
push("类型", null, 1);
var types = ["全部", "连载中", "已完结", "短篇"];
types.forEach((type, index) => {
    var url = `/api/novel?page={{(page-1)}}&pageSize=20&query=&provider=kakuyomu%2Csyosetu%2Cnovelup%2Chameln%2Cpixiv%2Calphapolis&type=${index}&level=0&translate=0&sort=0`;
    push(type, url, 0.25);
});
addSlots(types.length, 0.25);
push("分级", null, 1);
var levels = showR18 ? ["全部", "一般向", "R18"] : ["全部", "一般向"];
levels.forEach((level, index) => {
    var url = `/api/novel?page={{(page-1)}}&pageSize=20&query=&provider=kakuyomu%2Csyosetu%2Cnovelup%2Chameln%2Cpixiv%2Calphapolis&type=0&level=${index}&translate=0&sort=0`;
    push(level, url, 0.25);
});
addSlots(levels.length, 0.25);
push("排序", null, 1);
var sorts = ["更新", "点击"];
sorts.forEach((sort, index) => {
    var url = `/api/novel?page={{(page-1)}}&pageSize=20&query=&provider=kakuyomu%2Csyosetu%2Cnovelup%2Chameln%2Cpixiv%2Calphapolis&type=0&level=0&translate=0&sort=${index}`;
    push(sort, url, 0.25);
});
addSlots(sorts.length, 0.25);
JSON.stringify(discover);
</js>

loginUrl:
<js>
var login = () => {
    var username = source.getLoginInfoMap().get("账号");
    var password = source.getLoginInfoMap().get("密码");
    var res = java.post(
        `${baseUrl.replace('n', 'auth')}/api/v1/auth/login`,
        JSON.stringify({
            username: username,
            password: password,
            app: "legado"
        }),
        {"Content-Type": "application/json"}
    );
    source.putLoginHeader(JSON.stringify({
        Authorization: `Bearer ${res.body()}`
    }));
}
login();
</js>

ruleBookInfo.init:
<js>
var initUrl = book.bookUrl;
var url = initUrl.includes('api/novel') ? initUrl : initUrl.replace('/novel/', '/api/novel/');
var body = initUrl.includes('api/novel') ? result : java.ajax(url);
if (body.includes('ID不合适，应当使用')) {
    var match = body.match(/\/\w+\/[\w-]+/);
    url = `${book.origin}/api/novel${match}`;
    body = java.ajax(url);
}
if (body.includes("Token不合法或者过期")) {
    java.toast("当前会话已失效，请重新登录");
}
java.put('url', url);
body;
</js>

var data = JSON.parse(result);
var cnIntro = data.introductionZh;
var jpIntro = data.introductionJp;
var intro = cnIntro ? (value === '5' ? jpIntro : ['6', '8'].includes(value) ? cnIntro + "\n‎\n" + jpIntro : ['7', '9'].includes(value) ? jpIntro + "\n‎\n" + cnIntro : cnIntro) : jpIntro;
var timeStamp = '{{$.toc[-1].createAt}}' || '{{$.syncAt}}';
intro = '  📬最近' + ('{{$.toc[-1].createAt}}' ? '更新' : '同步') + '：' + java.timeFormat(timeStamp * 1000) + '\n‎\n' + intro;
intro;
</js>

ruleContent.content:
<js>
var token = source.getLoginHeader();
update(baseUrl, token);
var value = String(book.getVariable("custom")) || String(source.getVariable());
var get = /^[1-9]$/.test(value) ? value : '1';
var config = {
    1: 'sakuraParagraphs',
    2: 'gptParagraphs',
    3: 'youdaoParagraphs',
    4: 'baiduParagraphs',
    5: 'paragraphs'
};
var data = JSON.parse(result);
var content = data[config[get]] || data[config[1]] || data[config[2]] || data[config[3]] || data[config[4]] || data[config[5]];
if (['6', '7', '8', '9'].includes(get)) {
    var cnContent = data[config[1]] || data[config[2]] || data[config[3]] || data[config[4]];
    var jpContent = data[config[5]];
    if (cnContent) {
        if (['8', '9'].includes(get)) {
            var res = java.post(
                'https://static.kksk.io/api/kanji',
                JSON.stringify({"content": format(regex(jpContent))}),
                {"Content-Type": "application/json"}
            );
            var kanji = JSON.parse(res.body());
            jpContent = jpContent.map(text => annotate(text, kanji));
        }
        var type = ['6', '8'].includes(get);
        content = jpContent.flatMap((jp, i) => {
            if (!((jp || '').trim() && (cnContent[i] || '').trim())) return [];
            var pair = type ? [cnContent[i], jp] : [jp, cnContent[i]];
            return pair.filter(Boolean).concat(i === jpContent.length - 1 ? [] : '\u200B');
        }).filter(Boolean);
    } else {
        content = jpContent;
    }
}
format(regex(content));
</js>

searchUrl:
<js>
var providers = {
    kakuyomu: /(?:https?:\/\/)?kakuyomu\.jp\/works\/(\d+)/,
    syosetu: /(?:https?:\/\/)?(ncode|novel18)\.syosetu\.com\/(\w+)/,
    novelup: /(?:https?:\/\/)?novelup\.plus\/story\/(\d+)/,
    hameln: /(?:https?:\/\/)?syosetu\.org\/novel\/(\d+)/,
    pixiv: /(?:https?:\/\/)?(www\.pixiv\.net\/novel\/series\/(\d+)|www\.pixiv\.net\/novel\/show\.php\?id=(\d+))/,
    alphapolis: /(?:https?:\/\/)?www\.alphapolis\.co\.jp\/novel\/(\d+)\/(\d+)/,
    sakura: /(?:https?:\/\/)?(?:books\d?\.fishhawk\.top|n\.novelia\.cc)\/(?:api\/)?novel\/(\w+)\/([\w-]+)/
};
var url;
for (var provider in providers) {
    var match = key.match(providers[provider]);
    if (match) {
        var providerId = provider === 'sakura' ? match[1] : provider;
        var novelId = provider === 'alphapolis' ? `${match[1]}-${match[2]}` : provider === 'pixiv' ? (match[3] ? `s${match[3]}` : match[2]) : (match[2] || match[1]);
        url = `${baseUrl}/api/novel/${providerId}/${novelId}`;
        break;
    }
}
if (!url) {
    url = `${baseUrl}/api/novel?page=${page-1}&pageSize=20&query=${key}&provider=kakuyomu,syosetu,novelup,hameln,pixiv,alphapolis&type=0&level=0&translate=0&sort=1`;
}
url;
</js>
variableComment: 输入对应数字刷新即可获取对应文本，{1: "sakura译文", 2: "gpt译文", 3: "有道译文", 4: "百度译文", 5: "原文", 6: "中日对照", 7: "日中对照", 8: "6+平假注音", 9: "7+平假注音"}，默认sakura译文。书籍变量作用于一本书，源变量作用于整个书源，书籍变量优先级高于源变量。

jsLib:
var ho='https://m.qidian.com'
var h='http://111.170.19.23:49998/'

ruleContent.content:
<js>
token = source.get('token');
if (token == null || token == '') {
    token = source.getVariable();
}
a=java.hexDecodeToString(result)
if(a.match(/juanming/)){
	result=''
}else {
bid=java.hexDecodeToString(result).split(",")[0]
cid=java.hexDecodeToString(result).split(",")[1];
t=chapter.tag.match(/\|\s+(.*)/)[1];
if(chapter.isVip()){
	url=`{{h}}content.php?bookId=${bid}&chapterId=${cid},{"headers":{"tokens": "${token}","chapterTime": "${t}"}}`
	re=java.ajax(url)
	if (JSON.parse(re).code==200){
	c=JSON.parse(re).data
	}else{
		er=JSON.parse(re).error
		java.toast(er)
		c=''
		}
	}else {
   r = String(java.ajax(
        "https://m.qidian.com/chapter/" + bid + "/" + cid + ".html"
    ));
    c = org.jsoup.Jsoup
        .parse(r)
        .select('main#c-' + cid)
        .html();
        c=String(c).replace(/<\/?p>/g,'')
}c
}
</js>
